title: TotalWar
description: This project will allow you to engage in epic battles using weapons, military equipment, and large maps.
body:
TotalWar is a Forge mod that adds a structured, session-based large-scale PvP gameplay system to Minecraft servers.

The mod is designed for organized matches, events, and competitive gameplay, providing tools for team-based battles, match management, and custom in-game interfaces.

What does this mod do?

Adds a full match system with teams, rounds, and scoring

Provides custom GUI screens for match control and player interaction

Implements server-side match logic and synchronization

Supports structured PvP events and competitive scenarios

Includes optional integrations with other mods when present

Why use TotalWar?

Designed for servers that host organized PvP events or mini-games

Centralizes match logic instead of relying on commands and plugins

Provides a consistent and controlled gameplay flow for large battles

Important information before downloading

Minecraft version: 1.20.1

Loader: Forge (47.4.10 or newer)

Side: Server & Client

Dependencies: None required (optional integrations supported if other mods are installed)

Networking:

This mod does not upload any data to remote servers

No telemetry or background connections are used

Usage

Most interactions are done through in-game GUI menus or server-triggered events.
This mod is intended primarily for server environments.

License

This project is released under a custom All Rights Reserved license.

You are allowed to:

Download and use the mod

Redistribute the original, unmodified mod files (including in modpacks)

You are not allowed to:

Modify, decompile for redistribution, or publish derivative works

Reupload modified or repackaged versions

Claim authorship or remove attribution

See the included LICENSE file for full terms.

Community & Support
